name: Notifications
title: Notifications
intro: The notifications are divided into error, warning and status notifications. The notification number indicates the type of notification:

paragraphs: These notifications are generated if an EDS is checked (see command Check EDS).
These notifications are generated if are compared via command Compare Object or attributes of an object have changed.

sections.heading: 1100 - 1200: Notifications while an EDS is loaded

paragraphs: These notifications are generated if an EDS file is loaded.
